title: Accounting Year Periods collection schema
description: A schema for retrieving the periods of an accounting year.

items.title: Period
items.description: A specific period in the accounting year.

periodNumber.description: A unique identifier of the period.

accountingYear.description: The accounting year the period is part of.

year.description: A unique identifier of the accounting year.

self.description: A unique reference to the accounting year resource.

fromDate.description: The first date in the period formated according to ISO-8601 (YYYY-MM-DD).

toDate.description: The last date in the period formated according to ISO-8601 (YYYY-MM-DD).

closed.description: Determines if the period is closed for further transactions.

entries.description: A link to a collection of all entries booked in the period.

totals.description: A link to the chart of accounts with the periods total in base currency.

self.description: A unique link reference to the period item.

metaData.description: Information about possible actions, endpoints and resource paths related to the endpoint.

self.description: A unique reference to the accounting year periods resource.
